name: kafka-mcp
description: Read-only Kafka MCP brick — list topics, describe partitions, search messages by key in a time window, retrieve individual messages. Safe for investigator agents; no offset commits, no produce.

serverConfigOptions.name: HTTP (streamable-http)
serverConfigOptions.description: Run the HTTP server and connect via MCP streamable-HTTP transport

tools.name: list_topics
tools.description: List all topic names visible on the Kafka broker

tools.name: describe_topic
tools.description: Return partition count, replication factor, and per-partition offsets for a topic

tools.name: search_messages
tools.description: Scan partitions for messages matching a key (order_id, msisdn, customer_id, product_id) in a time window; returns evidence payloads

tools.name: get_message
tools.description: Retrieve a single Kafka message by topic, partition, and offset
